title: rubus ferrugineus
intro: Rubus ferrugineus, also known as the rusty-leaved bramble or rusty-leaved raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus ferrugineus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
